languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

languages.text: {n}Тразин издает самодовольный хохоток.{/n} "Мудро. Короткоживущим не стоит заигрывать с тайнами, скрытыми во мраке древности".
{n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."
languages.original_text: {n}Тразин издает самодовольный хохоток.{/n} "Мудро. Короткоживущим не стоит заигрывать с тайнами, скрытыми во мраке древности".

{n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn deja escapar una risotada de satisfacción.{/n} «Sabi{mf|o|a}. Las especies de vida efímera no deberían jugar con los secretos ocultos en las oscuras mareas del tiempo».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn deja escapar una risotada de satisfacción.{/n} «Sabi{mf|o|a}. Las especies de vida efímera no deberían jugar con los secretos ocultos en las oscuras mareas del tiempo».

languages.text: {n}特拉金发出一阵自得的笑声。{/n}“明智之举。短命的物种的确不应去窥探隐藏在远古黑暗中的秘密。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金发出一阵自得的笑声。{/n}“明智之举。短命的物种的确不应去窥探隐藏在远古黑暗中的秘密。”

languages.text: {n}Trazyn éclate d'un rire suffisant.{/n} « Sage décision. Les espèces aux vies éphémères ne devraient pas badiner avec les secrets cachés dans les ténèbres de l'antiquité. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn éclate d'un rire suffisant.{/n} « Sage décision. Les espèces aux vies éphémères ne devraient pas badiner avec les secrets cachés dans les ténèbres de l'antiquité. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn, kendinden memnun bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Akıllıca. Kısa ömürlü türler, antik çağın karanlığında saklı sırlarla oynamamalıdır."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn, kendinden memnun bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Akıllıca. Kısa ömürlü türler, antik çağın karanlığında saklı sırlarla oynamamalıdır."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn lacht selbstgefällig.{/n} "Weise. Kurzlebige Spezies sollten nicht leichtfertig mit Geheimnissen umgehen, die in dunkler Vergangenheit verborgen sind."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn lacht selbstgefällig.{/n} "Weise. Kurzlebige Spezies sollten nicht leichtfertig mit Geheimnissen umgehen, die in dunkler Vergangenheit verborgen sind."

languages.text: {n}トラズンは満足げに笑う。{/n}「賢明だ。短命な種族は、古代の闇に隠された秘密を弄ぶべきではない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn lets out a self-satisfied laugh.{/n} "Wise. Short-lived species should not trifle with secrets hidden in the darkness of antiquity."

traits.locale_text: {n}トラズンは満足げに笑う。{/n}「賢明だ。短命な種族は、古代の闇に隠された秘密を弄ぶべきではない。」
